name: obsidian-local-stt
description: Desktop-only Obsidian plugin bootstrap for local speech-to-text with a Rust sidecar.

scripts.check:js: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
scripts.check:rust: cargo fmt --manifest-path native/sidecar/Cargo.toml --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path native/sidecar/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --manifest-path native/sidecar/Cargo.toml
scripts.check: npm run check:js && npm run check:rust
